options.name: -clock_trees
options.description: Restricts the report to the specified clock trees

options.name: -delay_corners
options.description: Restricts the report to the specified delay corners ((delay_corner)+, optional)

options.name: -early
options.description: Only report on the early half of the delay corners

options.name: -file
options.description: Save a copy of the contents of the report to the specified file name

options.name: -late
options.description: Only report on the late half of the delay corners

options.name: -list_special_pins
options.description: List individual pins that are stop, ignore, min or other special types

options.name: -no_invalidate
options.description: Do not invalidate the timing engine.

options.name: -num_cap_violating_pins
options.description: Maximum number of maximum output capacitance violating pins to display. The default is 10.

options.name: -num_fanout_violating_nets
options.description: Maximum number of fanout violating nets to display. The default is 10.

options.name: -num_length_violating_nets
options.description: Maximum number of max_source_to_sink_net_length violating nets to display. The default is 10.

options.name: -num_resistance_violating_nets
options.description: Maximum number of max_source_to_sink_net_resistance violating nets to display. The default is 10.

options.name: -num_slew_violating_pins
options.description: Maximum number of slew violating pins to display. The default is 10.

options.name: -skip_timing_update
options.description: Do not update the timing engine.

options.name: -tcl_list
options.description: Returns the report as Tcl formatted data, and formats the -file as tcl if specified

options.name: -views
options.description: Restricts the report to the delay corners associated with the specified views ((analysis_view)+, optional)
